HomePage.title: Welcome to Valora
HomePage.description: This page gives you a simple overview of what the system already does and how it supports your daily work.

status.title: System ready to use
status.description: You can already navigate the workspace, organize your structure, and evolve your records safely.

workspace.title: Current workspace
workspace.description: You are in the protected area with an active session and everything prepared for a smooth workflow.

locale.title: Language and region
locale.description: The platform is already prepared to support multiple languages without losing navigation consistency.

entryFlow.title: Current flow
entryFlow.description: At sign-in, the system already identifies your context so you can continue from the right place without manual setup.

tenant.title: Organization and team
tenant.description: Define who is part of the operation and which role each person has in daily work.

location.title: Location structure
location.description: Organize your operation by units and hierarchy levels to keep a clear view of the whole.

mortalidade.description: Compare the unit mortality against the standard mortality, by age.

FieldConfigurationPage.title: Fields
FieldConfigurationPage.description: Adjust here the names of the information you measure or record in events. For every name (such as quantity or amount), you tell the system how to read the content: whole numbers, values with cents, yes or no, and similar choices. That applies when you build calculation rules and when you record events, so values stay consistent and are not misread.
FieldConfigurationPage.empty: No fields were found for the active scope and your current permission does not allow creating new ones.

list.missingCurrentScope: Set an active scope from the header selector before editing fields.

fieldName.hint: Field name. Enter a short, easy-to-understand name, for example: quantity, value, growth percentage. This name is used in formulas, charts, and reports.

ActionConfigurationPage.description: Define here the kinds of operations or measurements that become events in the active scope (for example housing or mortality). For each action you provide a clear name; that name appears when you build rules and record events.

recurrence.label: Recurring action
recurrence.hint: Enable this when the effect of the action should keep applying from the event date until the next event of the same action or until the final age.

formulas.title: Formulas
formulas.description:
Formulas are calculation steps applied when events for this action are processed. Each step is text where you can write numbers, operations (such as + and *), and references to information in the scope.

Type @ to open a list and insert a field:n reference. Type # to open the same list and insert an input:n reference. The selected name appears underlined in the text and you can keep typing as usual.

The list order is execution order, top to bottom. Drag the handle beside a formula to reorder before saving.
formulas.exampleList:
Math examples:
Addition: x + y
Subtraction: x - y
Multiplication: x * y
Division: x / y
Integer division: x // y
Modulo: x % y
Power: x ** 2
Parentheses: (x + y) * z
Rounding: round((x * y) / z, 2)
Minimum: min(x, y, z)
Maximum: max(x, y, z)
Absolute value: abs(x - y)
Decimal: Decimal("0.2") * x

Conditional examples:
Simple condition: x if y > 0 else 0
Equality condition: x + 10 if y == 1 else x - 10
Max/min condition: max(x, y) if z > 100 else min(x, y)
Safe division condition: round(x / y, 2) if y != 0 else 0
And condition: x if (y > 0 and z > 0) else 0

Dates:
Add one day: x + timedelta(1)
Add seven days: x + timedelta(7)
Add one month: add_months(x, 1)
Add one year: add_years(x, 1)

Other supported features:
Comparisons: x == y, x != y, x > y, x >= y, x < y, x <= y
Logical: x > 0 and y > 0, x > 0 or y > 0, not (x > y)
Date: x if data_ref > date(2026, 1, 1) else y
Functions: abs, min, max, round, Decimal, date, timedelta, add_months, and add_years
formulas.removeAriaLabel: Mark formula for removal on save
formulas.loadError: Could not load formulas. Try again.
formulas.statementRequired: Each active formula needs a non-empty statement.

validationError.formula_invalid_assignment: Each step must have exactly one assignment: what receives the value, an equals sign, then the calculation. Check that there is only one assignment equals sign and that neither side is empty.
validationError.formula_invalid_target: Only the field that should receive the result may appear to the left of the equals sign (a field:n reference), nothing else.
validationError.formula_unknown_field_id: The formula references information that does not exist in this scope. Adjust the chosen items or the text.
validationError.formula_expression_invalid: The calculation to the right of the equals sign could not be validated. Check parentheses, operators, and allowed functions (such as abs, min, max, round, Decimal, date, timedelta, add_months, and add_years).

CalculationPage.title: Current age calculation
CalculationPage.description: Use optional filters (unity, location, item) to recalculate the current age field from events with initial and final age on the same unity, and review saved results.

status.readyDescription: The active scope already has one initial, one current, and one final age field to support the daily recalculation.
status.missingDescription: Before calculating, mark in the scope fields which one is initial age, current age, and final age.

state.emptyScope: Create a scope before calculating the current age.
state.missingCurrentScope: Select an active scope in the header before calculating the current age.
state.readOnlyNotice: You can view this panel, but only master or administrator members can recalculate and write results.

panel.unityHint: Optional. Limits the calculation to events for this unity. With a unity selected, location follows the unity record and the item list shows only items allowed for it.
panel.locationHint: Optional. With a unity selected, location is fixed to the unity and cannot be changed here. Without a unity, leave blank for no location filter.
panel.itemHint: Optional. With a unity selected, only items allowed for that unity appear. Without a unity, leave blank for no item filter.
panel.error: Could not calculate the current age. Try again.
panel.errorMissingFormulaInput: Provide {fieldLabel} in formula {formulaLabel} for the event {eventLabel}.
panel.deleteError: Could not delete the results. Try again.

result.empty: No eligible event produced results with the current filters.
result.emptyNoEventsInScope: There are no events in scope matching the filters.
result.emptyNoEligibleWindow: There are analyzed events, but no eligible set was found. To calculate, there must be an initial age followed by a final age on the same unity.
result.emptyNoResultsAfterCalculation: Eligible events were found, but no new result was produced.
result.emptyNoPersistedResults: There are no saved calculated results for the current filters.
result.emptyNoResultsToDelete: There were no calculated results to delete for the current filters.

LocationConfigurationPage.title: Locations
LocationConfigurationPage.description: In this panel you see your location tree. The hierarchy appears on the left; beside it is the form to edit the name and other information about the location, plus the history panel. Select a location in the tree to edit it, or click the New button to create a new subdivision at that location.

LoginPage.title: Your business presented in numbers you stand behind with purpose and provenance.
LoginPage.description: One source of truth that grows with the company, with aligned versions, improving results and lowering risk. Sign in with Google to open the right organizational context for this session.
